docs:
# OTP Input
Segmented one-time-password input with paste support and arrow navigation.
## Import
```tsx
import { OtpInput } from "@/components/ui/otp-input";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<OtpInput length={6} value={undefined} readOnly={undefined} size={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **length** (number) — default: `6`: Length
- **value** (number): Value
- **readOnly** (boolean): Read only
- **size** (string): Size
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add otp-input
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/otp-input
```
